descriptions: The Rebels motorcycle gang joined Hells Angels by patching over in 1998.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 1998, the Rebels "patched over" to join the Hells Angels.

descriptions: Sputniks viewed the Oxo group as invaders and enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: The motto of the gang was 'He who comes to destroy us, will himself be destroyed' which is a direct reference to the Visayan gangs like the Oxo group who the Sputniks felt had 'invaded' the Tagalog territory of Manila.

descriptions: The two gangs were at war before merging.
edges.evidence_quote: For years, the Supreme Gangsters had an outstanding war with the Black Disciples Nation, led by David Barksdale.

descriptions: The two gangs agreed to a ceasefire and merged.
edges.evidence_quote: In 1969, Hoover and Barksdale agreed to a ceasefire. This resulted in the creation of the Black Gangster Disciple Nation.

Clan Graziano.description: The Clan Graziano is a Camorra organization originating from Quindici, Italy. It has been involved in a violent conflict with the rival Cava clan since the 1980s, initially over post-earthquake reconstruction funds. The clan was part of the larger 'Clan dei Quindiciari' and later joined the Nuova Camorra Organizzata. It has been active since the 1960s and has managed to elect mayors in Quindici.

descriptions: The two clans were in a feud.
edges.evidence_quote: faida tra i Cava e i Graziano

descriptions: Clan Cava has been in a bloody feud with Clan Graziano for over thirty years.
edges.evidence_quote: Questa cosca , da oltre trent'anni, è protagonista di una sanguinosa faida con l'altro clan del Vallo di Lauro, quello dei Graziano .

descriptions: Clan Graziano plotted to kill Salvatore Cava and his mother, indicating conflict with Clan Cava.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 1º agosto 2019 sono stati arrestati 5 esponenti del clan Graziano , che stavano tramando l'eliminazione di Salvatore Cava (figlio del boss Biagio e scarcerato nel maggio dello stesso anno) e della madre di Salvatore Cava

descriptions: Cava and Graziano were in a feud (faida) since the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: La mattanza fu conseguenza della faida che, già dai primi anni '80, vedeva contrapposti i Cava ed i Graziano.

descriptions: Cava and Graziano were formerly allies before the 1980 earthquake.
edges.evidence_quote: Le due potenti cosche - un tempo alleate - entrano in guerra a seguito del Terremoto dell'Irpinia del 1980

descriptions: Graziano and Cava have been in a decade-long faida since the 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: faida di Quindici : faida più che decennale tra le famiglie Graziano e Cava

descriptions: The Graziano clan has been in a fierce conflict with the Cava clan for decades.
edges.evidence_quote: Da decenni è coinvolto in un feroce conflitto, nel quale è contrapposto al clan Cava.

descriptions: The Graziano and Cava clans were previously allied in a single clan before splitting.
edges.evidence_quote: I due clan, fino ad allora alleati in un unico clan, si scindono.

descriptions: Graziano was part of the Clan dei Quindiciari alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: I Cava, i Graziano ed altre famiglie criminali erano strette in un'alleanza che formava quello che, un tempo, era detto Clan dei Quindiciari.

descriptions: The Graziano clan was part of the unified Clan dei Quindiciari together with the Cava and other families.
edges.evidence_quote: Il clan era già attivo durante gli anni Sessanta e, congiuntamente agli attuali rivali dei Cava e ad altre famiglie criminali, formava un unico gruppo camorristico, denominato "Clan dei Quindiciari".

descriptions: Graziano and Grasso were in conflict, which Graziano won.
edges.evidence_quote: Il conflitto Grasso-Graziano si chiude con i Graziano vincenti.

descriptions: The Graziano clan was in a feud with the Grasso family, which ended with Graziano's victory.
edges.evidence_quote: La faida tra i Graziano e i Grasso si concluse con il trionfo dei primi

descriptions: The Graziano clan joined the Nuova Camorra Organizzata.
edges.evidence_quote: adesione dei Graziano alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: Graziano joined the Nuova Camorra Organizzata in the early 1980s.
edges.evidence_quote: l'adesione dei Graziano alla Nuova Camorra Organizzata

descriptions: A member of Clan Serino killed two nephews of a Graziano family member.
edges.evidence_quote: un esponente del clan Serino avrebbe ucciso nel 1989 due nipoti di uno dei membri di spicco della famiglia Graziano

descriptions: National Islamic Unity Party split from Islamic Unity Party.
edges.evidence_quote: One of these was Ustad Muhammad Akbari, a Shia Hazara politician who separated from Abdul-Ali Mazari's Islamic Unity Party to form the National Islamic Unity Party

descriptions: National Islamic Unity Party aligned politically with the Taliban.
edges.evidence_quote: One of these was Ustad Muhammad Akbari, a Shia Hazara politician who separated from Abdul-Ali Mazari's Islamic Unity Party to form the National Islamic Unity Party, thereafter politically aligning himself and his group, which gained the support of the majority of Islamic Unity Party members in the Hazara hinterland, with the Taliban.

descriptions: Dirty Dozen feuded with Seekers MC in 1976.
edges.evidence_quote: A series of shootings and fights broke out between members of the Dirty Dozen and the rival Seekers MC

descriptions: FARC was part of the Simón Bolívar Guerrilla Coordinating Board.
edges.evidence_quote: On 3 June 1991, dialogue resumed between the Simón Bolívar Guerrilla Coordinating Board and the government on neutral territory in Caracas, Venezuela and Tlaxcala, Mexico.

descriptions: FARC is part of the Simón Bolívar Guerrilla Coordinating Board.
edges.evidence_quote: Part of: Simón Bolívar Guerrilla Coordinating Board

descriptions: La Raza Nation is a rival of Gran Familia Mexicana.
edges.evidence_quote: A 1996 police report noted La Raza as the rival of the Gran Familia Mexicana

descriptions: Giglio and Valente were formerly allies but later became rivals, leading to a feud in 2000.
edges.evidence_quote: Nell'anno 2000 esplode una faida a Strongoli , tra le 'ndrine dei Giglio e dei Valente prima alleate ora in contrasto per il traffico di droga, di armi e delle estorsioni .

descriptions: The two sets held a peace meeting in 2022, which was successful.
edges.evidence_quote: Skipp Townsend held a peace meeting over brunch with the rivaling Rollin' 60s Crips and Inglewood Family Bloods at a restaurant in Manhattan Beach.

descriptions: George Street was formed to oppose Majestic Alley, indicating a founding rivalry.
edges.evidence_quote: George Street are a Bloods-affiliated street gang in Southside Belize City, allegedly formed in the late 1980s by US deportee Heathcliff Reyes to oppose the concurrently formed Majestic Alley (Crips).

descriptions: Majestic Alley is affiliated with Crips.
edges.evidence_quote: Majestic Alley are a Crips-affiliated street gang

descriptions: The Galician Mafia is allied with French Milieu.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Colombian cartels , Mexican drug cartels , British crime firms , French Milieu , Gang de la Brise de Mer , Camorra , Sicilian Mafia , 'Ndrangheta

descriptions: The Milanese faction of Cursoti is allied with the Sciuto-Tigna clan.
edges.evidence_quote: In questo momento risulta legata da alleanza ai clan Cappello , Sciuto-Tigna e Piacenti detti Ceusi .

descriptions: Famiglia Bonaccorsi is the military wing of Clan Cappello.
edges.evidence_quote: L'ala militare del clan: Famiglia Bonaccorsi "i carateddi"

descriptions: Bacchus has a close relationship with Highlanders MC.
edges.evidence_quote: The club manages close relationships with other well-established Canadian motorcycle clubs like Para-dice Riders MC, Vagabonds MC, Highlanders MC, and the Charlottetown Harley Club.

descriptions: SSA-S was established by Yawd Serk from SURA soldiers.
edges.evidence_quote: Lieutenant General Yawd Serk of the Shan United Revolutionary Army (SURA) led 800 soldiers under his command to central Shan State and established the Shan State Army – South (SSA-S) on 26 January 1996

descriptions: R4W is a subset of the Alameddine family.
edges.evidence_quote: After the arrests of the Alameddine family's R4W subset

descriptions: R4W is a subset of the Alameddine crime network.
edges.evidence_quote: The men arrested were part of a subset within the Alameddine crime network known as 'R4W', or Ready for War.

Metz Gang.description: The Metz Gang was a notorious drug ring founded by Glenn Metz and his brother Cordell Metz, active from 1985 to 1992 in New Orleans. It distributed approximately 1,000 kilograms of cocaine in the New Orleans metropolitan area and committed murders, attempted murders, and other violent crimes. Glenn Metz is currently serving life in prison.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Sam Clay organization as a rival of the Metz Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Various organizations over, Sam Clay organization

descriptions: The Irish Republican Socialist Party is the political wing of the Irish National Liberation Army.
edges.evidence_quote: the Irish National Liberation Army (with their political wing, the Irish Republican Socialist Party)

descriptions: H3 is a cell/splinter of the Caballeros Templarios.
edges.evidence_quote: diferentes células de los Caballeros Templarios entre ellos ... los «h3»

descriptions: Both groups are mentioned as attacking autodefensas, but no direct relationship between them is stated.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Viagras y los H3

descriptions: SPLM-N (Agar) is listed as an opponent of RSF.
edges.evidence_quote: Opponents: ... SPLM-N (Agar)

Zemun Clan.description: The Zemun Clan is a Serbian mafia group based in Zemun, a municipality of Belgrade. It rose to prominence between 2000 and 2003, becoming one of the most powerful criminal organizations in Southeast Europe. The clan was involved in drug trafficking, arms smuggling, extortion, and contract killings, and had connections with Serbian state security and paramilitary units. Its leader Dušan Spasojević was linked to the assassination of Prime Minister Zoran Đinđić in 2003, after which a major crackdown weakened the group.

descriptions: Pink Panthers are allied with Zemun Clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Serbian mafia , Zemun Clan , Russian mafia , Romanian mafia

descriptions: The infobox lists Zemun Clan as an ally of the Serb mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Hells Angels , Brödraskapet , Fucked For Life , Bratva , Obshchak , Zemun Clan , Serb Volunteer Guard

descriptions: Zemun clan is a component of the Serbian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zemun clan is a component of the Serbian mafia.

descriptions: Zemun clan is a Serbian criminal group, part of Serbian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Zemun clan member Ninoslav Konstantinović fled the Netherlands to Italy after his brother was arrested in 2003. In Italy he became a leading heroin distributor and professional hitman, working for the Camorra in Naples

descriptions: The clan incorporated members of the Red Berets paramilitary unit.
edges.evidence_quote: El clan creció en importancia después de la caída de Slobodan Milošević con la llegada de muchos paramilitares boinas rojas, incluyendo Milorad Ulemek.

descriptions: Zemun clan hired hitmen to kill members of Bulgarian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: Croatian hitman Robert Matanić and his colleagues were hired by the Zemun clan to kill members of the competing Bulgarian mafia for the Balkan drug route.

descriptions: Zemun clan member worked for Camorra.
edges.evidence_quote: Zemun clan member Ninoslav Konstantinović fled the Netherlands to Italy after his brother was arrested in 2003. In Italy he became a leading heroin distributor and professional hitman, working for the Camorra in Naples

descriptions: The clan is a constituent part of the Serbian mafia.
edges.evidence_quote: El Clan de Zemun ... es uno de los clanes de Belgrado de la Mafia serbia.

descriptions: The Zemun Clan cooperated with the BIA by providing information in exchange for training.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2001, the Zemun clan organized 'special training courses' with the BIA, lending them information on Kosovar Albanian insurgents in exchange.

descriptions: The clan cooperated with BIA by providing training and exchanging information.
edges.evidence_quote: En 2001, el clan Zemun organizó 'cursos de formación especiales' con la BIA, prestándoles, a cambio, información sobre insurgentes albaneses de Kosovo.

descriptions: The Zemun Clan incorporated many veterans of the Special Operations Unit, including its commander.
edges.evidence_quote: The Zemun clan grew in prominence after the downfall of Slobodan Milošević with an influx of many veterans of the Special Operations Unit (widely known as Red Berets), including the unit's commander, Milorad Ulemek.

descriptions: The Zemun Clan attempted to assassinate the leader of the Surčin clan, Ljubiša Buha, twice in 2002.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2002, the clan attempted to assassinate Buha twice: once in front of his company Defense Road in Belgrade, and again during his vacation in Istanbul.

descriptions: The Zemun Clan initially operated under the control or in cooperation with the Surčin clan.
edges.evidence_quote: Presumably, the group operated either under the control, or in cooperation with, the Surčin clan, the largest organised car theft group in the country.

descriptions: The clan had connections with elements of the UDBA secret service.
edges.evidence_quote: Estas eran personas que tenían entrenamiento militar, experiencia en la guerra y conexiones con los elementos del UDBA, el servicio secreto del estado serbio.

Camorra barese.description: Camorra barese is the informal name for organized crime operating in Bari and its province, distinct from the Neapolitan Camorra. It consists of confederations of clans primarily involved in drug trafficking, smuggling, and extortion. Main clans include Strisciuglio, Capriati, and Parisi-Palermiti. The organization emerged in the late 1970s and 1980s, evolving from common crime to large-scale heroin trafficking.

Mafia Capitale.description: Mafia Capitale is an organized crime organization based in Rome, Italy, founded in 1999 by Massimo Carminati and Salvatore Buzzi. It engaged in money laundering, racketeering, political corruption, and bid rigging, stealing funds from city services. The organization was active from 1999 to 2014, and in 2020 Italy's Supreme Court ruled that its acts did not constitute mafia association.

descriptions: Morabito, via Sculli, contacted the leaders of Mafia Capitale in Rome.
edges.evidence_quote: A Roma, sempre tramite Sculli, sono stati peraltro in contatto con i vertici di Mafia Capitale

descriptions: Mafia Capitale has its roots in Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: Il 2 dicembre 2014 l'ex NAR Massimo Carminati, vicino alla Banda già dalla fine degli anni ‘70, viene arrestato assieme ad alcuni complici nell'ambito dell'operazione Mafia Capitale ; chiamata come Cupola Romana o ancora Clan Carminati , questa organizzazione operava a Roma già a partire dal 2000 circa, affondando le sue radici nelle rapine dei NAR degli anni ottanta e successivamente nella stessa banda della Magliana.

descriptions: Members of 'Ndrangheta were investigated alongside Mafia Capitale members, indicating association.
edges.evidence_quote: Among those investigated are former mayor Gianni Alemanno and the bosses Salvatore Buzzi and Massimo Carminati, a former member of Nuclei Armati Rivoluzionari and Banda della Magliana, as well as members of the 'Ndrangheta.

descriptions: Massimo Carminati, a founder of Mafia Capitale, was a former member of Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: Massimo Carminati, a former member of Nuclei Armati Rivoluzionari and Banda della Magliana

descriptions: Mafia Capitale is a successor/continuation of Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: The latest creation of Italian organized crime, Mafia Capitale (which was partially a successor or continuation of Banda della Magliana, involving many former Banda della Magliana members and associates), was mostly disbanded by the police in 2014.

descriptions: Mafia Capitale was founded from the remains of the Banda della Magliana.
edges.evidence_quote: It was founded in the early 2000s by Massimo Carminati from the remains of the Banda della Magliana.

descriptions: Massimo Carminati, a founder of Mafia Capitale, was a former member of Nuclei Armati Rivoluzionari.
edges.evidence_quote: Massimo Carminati, a former member of Nuclei Armati Rivoluzionari and Banda della Magliana

descriptions: Mafia Capitale has its roots in the robberies of NAR.
edges.evidence_quote: questa organizzazione operava a Roma già a partire dal 2000 circa, affondando le sue radici nelle rapine dei NAR degli anni ottanta e successivamente nella stessa banda della Magliana.

descriptions: Gerace and Italiano were opposing sides in the Faida di Gioia Tauro.
edges.evidence_quote: Faida di Gioia Tauro, tra i Gerace e gli Italiano.

The Order.description: Neo-Nazi organization active in the United States from September 1983 to December 1984. Founded by Robert Jay Mathews, it aimed to overthrow the U.S. government and establish a white homeland. The group raised funds through armed robbery and was responsible for the murder of radio host Alan Berg. Its leader died in a shootout with FBI agents.

descriptions: The Order was formed by Mathews and several Aryan Nations members, indicating a close tie.
edges.evidence_quote: Robert Jay Mathews , who had visited the Aryan Nations compound many times, formed The Order , along with Aryan Nations members Dan Bauer, Randy Duey, Denver Parmenter, and Bruce Pierce.

edges.source: The Covenant, the Sword, and the Arm of the Lord
descriptions: The CSA had links to The Order.
edges.evidence_quote: The CSA had links to other radical organizations, including the Aryan Brotherhood, the Mountain Church, and The Order

edges.source: The Covenant, the Sword, and the Arm of the Lord
descriptions: CSA is affiliated with The Order.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: The Order , Aryan Nations , Elohim City

descriptions: The Order is affiliated with Aryan Nations as per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Affiliations: Aryan Nations

descriptions: The Order distributed robbery proceeds to the National Alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: Proceeds from these robberies were distributed to leaders of sympathetic organizations such as William Pierce (National Alliance) and Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr. (White Patriot Party).

descriptions: The Order II grew out of the original Order, attempting to perpetuate its activities.
edges.evidence_quote: Order II (Bruder Schweigen Strike Force II) was also anti-government and antisemitic.

descriptions: The Order distributed robbery proceeds to the White Patriot Party.
edges.evidence_quote: Proceeds from these robberies were distributed to leaders of sympathetic organizations such as William Pierce (National Alliance) and Frazier Glenn Miller, Jr. (White Patriot Party).

descriptions: PKS is linked to the Muslim Brotherhood, though no formal relationship.
edges.evidence_quote: One of the Muslim Brotherhood-linked parties is the PKS (Prosperous Justice Party)

descriptions: 1400 EstateBoyz is a smaller gang allied to The Americans or Hard Livings.
edges.evidence_quote: Smaller gangs in Cape Town that might be allied to one of the two larger umbrella gangs include Young Dixie Boys, Clever Kids, Naughty Boys, the Junky Funky Kids,1400 EstateBoyz ,Respectable Peacefuls, Wonder Kids, School Boys and Yuru Cats.

descriptions: 1400 EstateBoyz is a smaller gang allied to The Americans or Hard Livings.
edges.evidence_quote: Smaller gangs in Cape Town that might be allied to one of the two larger umbrella gangs include Young Dixie Boys, Clever Kids, Naughty Boys, the Junky Funky Kids,1400 EstateBoyz ,Respectable Peacefuls, Wonder Kids, School Boys and Yuru Cats.

descriptions: 1400 EstateBoyz is an ally of The Americans per infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: The YN's , 1400 EstateBoyz , Nigerian mafia , Triads

descriptions: Cuba is an alleged ally of the Cartel of the Suns.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: ... Cuba (allegedly)

Black Dragons.description: Chinese-American criminal organization and street gang formed in 1980 in Lincoln Heights, Los Angeles, by Chinese immigrants. Operated in Los Angeles and San Gabriel Valley, involved in organized crime (extortion, drug trafficking, counterfeiting) and street-level crime (murder, robbery, car theft). Peaked with over 100 core members, dismantled in 2002-2003 after FBI's Operation Back Door, but reportedly revived in 2020.

descriptions: 14k Triad is listed as an ally of Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Asian Boyz is listed as an ally of Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Black Dragon member Elmo has relations with Cool Boyz Gang.
edges.evidence_quote: Over the years, One Black Dragon "Elmo", ( have made allies with numerous leaders and high ranking members of previous rival organizations, this member's information is from a reliable source. This member is also a member of the Hop Sing Tong, the late leader of Taiwan's United Bamboo Triad, (黃少岑 (Huang Shao-tsen), "Yao Yao") is also his godfather, and has family ties with the Asian Boyz Gang, and relations with the Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Cool Boyz Gang, and Wah Ching Gang.

descriptions: Hop Sing Tong is listed as an ally of Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Oriental Lazy Boyz is listed as an ally of Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Tiny Rascals is listed as a rival of Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Tiny Rascals

descriptions: United Bamboo Triad is listed as an ally of Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Vietnamese Boyz Gang is listed as an ally of Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Wah Ching is listed as an ally of Black Dragons in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: Wah Ching , Vietnamese Boyz Gang, Oriental Lazy Boyz , Asian Boyz , Hop Sing Tong, United Bamboo Triad, 14k Triad

descriptions: Black Dragons is listed as a rival of Wah Ching in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Black Dragons

Los Chone Killers.description: Ecuadorian criminal and narcoterrorist organization dedicated to drug trafficking, contract killing, and other crimes. Originally an armed wing of Los Choneros, it split off in 2020 after the murder of leader Jorge Luis Zambrano. Based in Guayas province with operations centered in Durán. The group has been involved in prison massacres and terrorist attacks, and maintains a territorial dispute with the Latin Kings since 2023.

descriptions: Chone Killers and Latin Kings are engaged in turf wars involving car-bombings.
edges.evidence_quote: turf wars between the Chone Killers (a splinter group of Los Choneros) and the Latin Kings have involved car-bombings targeting public officials.

descriptions: Los Chone Killers have a territorial dispute with Latin Kings in Durán since 2023.
edges.evidence_quote: La organización Chone Killers mantiene desde 2023 una disputa por el territorio contra los Latin Kings en la ciudad de Durán.

descriptions: Infobox lists Latin Kings as enemies of Los Chone Killers.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros , Latin Kings , Los Lagartos (en ocasiones)

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Choneros as enemies of Los Chone Killers.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros

descriptions: Los Chone Killers were originally an armed wing of Los Choneros, then separated in 2020.
edges.evidence_quote: Eran un brazo armado de Los Choneros hasta que se separaron en 2020

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Lagartos as occasional enemies of Los Chone Killers.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros , Latin Kings , Los Lagartos (en ocasiones)

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Lobos as allies of Los Chone Killers.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Tiguerones, Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Chone Killers and Los Pipos united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos ... se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

descriptions: Infobox lists Los Tiguerones as allies of Los Chone Killers.
edges.evidence_quote: Aliados: Los Tiguerones, Los Lobos

descriptions: Los Chone Killers originated from Los Ñetas.
edges.evidence_quote: El origen de los Chone Killers proviene de Los Ñetas

descriptions: Los Chone Killers is listed as a rival of Los Choneros in the infobox.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Los Lagartos, Los Lobos, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers

descriptions: Los Chone Killers were formerly part of Los Choneros but later became rivals, fighting for territory.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Chone Killers ... que funcionaban como parte de Los Choneros ... se unieron en una nueva estructura ... para disputar el territorio a Los Choneros

descriptions: Los Lobos list Los Chone Killers as enemies.
edges.evidence_quote: Enemigos: Los Choneros, Los Tiguerones, Los Chone Killers, Latin Kings

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Chone Killers united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos ... se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Chone Killers both broke away from Los Choneros at the same time.
edges.evidence_quote: broke away in 2020 after the death of Jorge Luis Zambrano, along with Los Chone Killers

descriptions: Los Lobos split from Los Choneros at the same time as Los Chone Killers.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos comenzaron como un grupo escondido del cártel de drogas Los Choneros, pero se separaron en 2020 después de la muerte de Jorge Luis Zambrano, junto con Los Chone Killers y Los Tiguerones.

descriptions: Los Lobos and Los Chone Killers both dissented from Los Choneros at the same time.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos começou como um grupo dissidente do cartel de drogas Los Choneros, mas se separou em 2020 após a morte de Jorge Luis Zambrano, juntamente com Los Chone Killers e Los Tiguerones

descriptions: Los Tiguerones and Los Chone Killers are allies in the Nueva Generación alliance.
edges.evidence_quote: In 2021, Los Tiguerones, along with other gangs formerly allied to Los Choneros, including Los Chone Killers, Los Pipos, and Los Lobos, announced the creation of an alliance dubbed Nueva Generación after an alliance with Jalisco New Generation Cartel.

descriptions: Los Tiguerones and Los Chone Killers united to form Nueva Generación.
edges.evidence_quote: Los Lobos , Los Tiguerones , Los Chone Killers y Los Pipos ... se unieron en una nueva estructura en 2021, la cual ha sido denominada Nueva Generación

descriptions: Los Tiguerones and Los Chone Killers both split from Los Choneros at the same time.
edges.evidence_quote: El grupo se dividió de Los Choneros en 2021, junto con Los Lobos y Los Chone Killers tras el asesinato del líder de Los Choneros, Jorge Luís Zambrano alias 'Rasquiña'.

descriptions: Martyr Amara Arab Women's Battalion was established as part of SDF.
edges.evidence_quote: an all-female Arab SDF group was established in Deir ez-Zor, the Martyr Amara Arab Women's Battalion
